title: euodia fraxinifolia
intro: Euodia fraxinifolia, also known as Fraxinella or Yellow Fruit Euodia, is a small shrub native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It is a member of the Rutaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Euodia fraxinifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euodia fraxinifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
